message:
feat(auth): add CredentialStatus enum and improve OAuth refresh test fidelity

Add CredentialStatus enum providing a clean query interface for stored
credential state (Missing, ApiKey, OAuthValid, OAuthExpired, BearerToken,
AwsCredentials, ServiceKey) with canonical provider alias fallback. This
enables the TUI and other consumers to display credential status without
pattern-matching on AuthCredential internals.

New AuthStorage::credential_status() method resolves provider aliases
through the canonical registry before credential lookup.

OAuth refresh test improvements:
- Use near-expiry tokens (5 min from now) instead of expires:0 to
  exercise the proactive refresh window path more realistically
- Assert refresh failure hints include "/login" guidance for actionable
  user recovery
- Add structured JSONL telemetry (pi.test.auth_event.v1) to all refresh
  scenarios for CI observability
- New test: auth_oauth_refresh_api_key_credentials_skip_refresh_vcr
  verifies API key credentials bypass the OAuth refresh path
- Helper tests for OpenAI/Google OAuth URL generation and token exchange
  round-trip persistence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
